Environmental Protection.summary: Lee consistently opposes federal environmental regulations, viewing them as overreach.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Lee opposes tax increases and supports flat or reduced tax structures.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Lee opposes abortion access and supports restrictions on reproductive healthcare.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Lee has opposed legislation expanding LGBTQ+ protections.
